account_structure.schwab_roth_ira: ~$4329.60 total — mostly long-term holdings + active W118 day trades (QTTB)
account_structure.schwab_margin: Active trading account — YMAT 87-share position held here
account_structure.webull_margin: $23 — small trades, subject to PDT (use sparingly)
account_structure.webull_cash: $31 — primary W118 day trading account (no PDT rule)

trades.notes: Clean W118 entry. Held well. First real win.
CHASED 30% above BUY signal. W118 BUY fired at $1.37, entered at $1.79. Classic bus-chasing mistake. Lesson: 3% rule — never enter more than 3% above signal.

trades.exit_reason: W118 SELL fired + K=100 overbought + halt resume
trades.notes: Entry was 12.9% above BUY signal ($8.37) — technically a chase but worked. Held through halt-up. Sold right when SELL fired. Textbook exit. Should have entered at $8.37 for +37% instead of +22%.
Quick scalp on QTTB re-entry. Clean in and out. 8 minutes.

Went to $11 after exit — missed $8.48 on 4 shares. Not a mistake to sell, just small position size. A+ entry was $5.54 premarket. Entered late at $9.42 (+69% from signal) but still caught +11%. Position sizing lesson: when setup is this clean from premarket, go bigger at the original signal.

trades.exit_reason: Manual cut after overnight hold — Pattern A fade, ZLSMA breakdown
trades.notes: Entered $1.49 without setting -8% stop ($1.371). Held overnight while stock broke below ZLSMA (Pattern A fade). Cut at $1.07 on May 27. Stop would have saved $26.19 — total cost $36.54 vs $10.35 with stop. THE airbag lesson. Never hold below ZLSMA. Never skip stop loss.

paper_trades.notes: Paper trade. Stock ran +72% on day. Exited early at $0.44 — could have held to $0.47+. Good practice run on re-entry setup.

summary.worst_trade: YMAT overnight hold -$36.54 (-28.2%) — missed stop loss
summary.lesson_of_the_week: The stop loss IS the trade. Never hold below ZLSMA overnight. Never skip the -8% stop. The airbag doesn't work if you unbuckle it. Also: the waiting game IS the game — 90% watching, 10% clicking. Never chase more than 3% above BUY signal.
